openGraph.title: AIthor – AI Agency Template for Framer
openGraph.description: AIthor is a conversion-focused Framer template built for chatbot and automation agencies who want a professional, high-converting website that starts winning clients from day one. Conversion-ready design. Easy to edit. Ready in hours.
